description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a high-wing configuration and a conventional tail. The fuselage is painted yellow with red accents on the wingtips, tail, and nose, and it features visible registration markings on the wings and fuselage. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed with clear windows. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a smaller tail wheel, indicating a taildragger configuration. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the engine cowling is painted red. The overall design suggests a light utility or trainer aircraft, suitable for short takeoffs and landings in urban or rural airstrips.
description: A small yellow and red high-wing, single-propeller airplane with a conventional tail and taildragger landing gear. Features an enclosed forward cockpit and visible registration markings.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the propeller, red nose, forward cockpit, and high-mounted wings with red-tipped ends.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the taildragger landing gear, registration markings on the wing and fuselage, and the red-tipped tail surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the tail section, high-wing structure, and the yellow fuselage with red accents.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the propeller, forward cockpit, and the high-wing configuration with visible landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and one tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single cockpit with clear side windows.
